description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a flat roof and extensive use of glass, concrete, and metal. The structure features multiple levels, including rooftop terraces with outdoor seating, a swimming pool, and landscaped areas. The front facade is dominated by large floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The building is surrounded by a manicured green lawn and includes a spacious patio area with lounge chairs and a pool. The design is characterized by clean lines, open spaces, and a minimalist aesthetic, typical of contemporary luxury homes. The bungalow appears to have several distinct zones, including living, recreational, and private areas, all integrated into a cohesive architectural form.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed bungalow with extensive glass facades, rooftop terraces, and a swimming pool, set on a manicured lawn. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and luxurious outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, rooftop terrace, pool, and patio area with lounge chairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop terrace with outdoor seating and the building's layered structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long glass wall, swimming pool, and additional rooftop features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary terrace, pool, and the building's angular layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and grouped side windows
